interpretation.megethos_only: Matching by complexity alone gives weak transfer (rho=0.12). Size is not enough.
interpretation.full_phoneme: Matching by ALL 5 phonemes gives strong transfer (rho=0.76-0.80). The phoneme space captures transferable arithmetic structure.
interpretation.key_insight: The 6.28x improvement from Megethos-only to full-phoneme shows that Arithmos (and the other non-Megethos phonemes) carry genuine cross-domain predictive power. EC torsion predicts NF class number at rho=0.76 when matched in the full phoneme space. This is CROSS-DOMAIN PREDICTION of arithmetic invariants.
interpretation.genus2_stronger: Genus2 Selmer -> NF class number (rho=0.80) is even stronger than EC torsion (rho=0.76). The Selmer group is a richer arithmetic invariant than torsion.
